function.name: agent
function.description: Spawn an autonomous sub-agent to complete a complex task. The sub-agent runs its own LLM loop with access to all currently-loaded tools (file operations, shell, web search, grep, etc.). Use this for multi-step tasks like: exploring a codebase to find specific patterns, analyzing code structure, generating implementation plans, researching a topic, or performing complex file operations that require multiple tool calls. The sub-agent's answer is returned as the tool result.

task.description: A clear, detailed description of the task for the sub-agent. Include all necessary context since the sub-agent starts with a fresh conversation. The sub-agent will not see the parent conversation history.

agent_type.description: Type of agent: 'general' for full autonomy with all tools, 'explore' for read-only investigation and analysis (will not modify files), 'plan' for producing structured implementation plans without modifications.

max_turns.description: Maximum number of tool-use turns the sub-agent may take (1-20). Default is 10. Use lower values for simple tasks, higher for complex multi-step tasks.
